=Semi-Classical Variation=
===4. Be2===
This is a move that can either lead to a transpositon to the Classical Variation with 4... Bg7 5. Nf3 or the aggressive 4... Bg7 5. g4 (Chinese Variation) and 4... Bg7 5. h4 (Bayonet Attack)
